items.title: RAISEVERN Unisex Summer T-Shirts Crewneck Cool Short Sleeve Funny Graphic Print Top Casual Tees
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: raisevern, unisex, summer, shirts, crewneck, print, top, casual, tees. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
